creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Hi Felippe,

Since the master site has been down for several weeks now, I'll host the distfiles.

Please consider using the attached shar file as the new source for games/openjazz.

NOTE : would it be possible to commit the original shar file before this one, to
keep a history of the port in CVS. That may be useful if, some day, the
distfiles become available again...

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
http://www.martymac.com
